title: helenium acaule
intro: Helenium acaule, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been employed in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as soothing respiratory issues, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. Helenium acaule can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used by indigenous cultures for centuries to treat a range of ailments.
